_comment: Settings for the spatial detection app. All fields are optional; defaults are used if a field is missing or this file is absent.
_display_comment: screen_size is your touchscreen panel resolution [w, h]. fullscreen hides the cursor and fills the screen. capture_fps is the sensor FPS shared by all OAK cameras; the official v3 stereo example uses 20. Going to 30 on three streams can overrun USB bandwidth (communication exception / stalls).
_model_comment: default_model is a display name shown in the GUI picker (e.g. a filename from models/). Empty = first discovered model. bb_scale/depth thresholds tune spatial coordinate sampling.
_capture_comment: Captures (photos, clips, time-lapse) save under save_root in a timestamped session folder. low_storage_mb warns and blocks captures below this free space.
_dataset_comment: The DATASET button saves the current clean frame plus the model's detections as a COCO object-detection dataset. Each model gets its own folder under dataset_root (accumulates across runs). dataset_min_confidence is the lowest detection confidence that becomes an annotation; frames with no qualifying boxes still save as negative samples.
